## Linked Issue

Closes #(issue number) — or remove this line if not applicable.

## Summary

Brief description of the changes and why they were made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] Build or CI/CD improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)

## Testing

Please describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Added or updated unit tests
- [ ] Added or updated integration tests
- [ ] Tested manually; steps:
  ```
  1.
  2.
  3.
  ```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My code follows the project's style and conventions
- [ ] I have run `cargo check` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` locally
- [ ] All tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] I have signed my commit(s) with GPG (`git commit -S`)
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) if applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation or comments if needed
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced

- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes

  ```
  [Description here]
  ```
